nasb.text: Therefore if you are presenting your offering at the altar, and there remember that your brother has something against you,

esv.text: So if you are offering your gift at the altar and there remember that your brother has something against you,

cnv.text: 所以你在祭壇上獻供物的時候，如果在那裡想起你的弟兄對你不滿，

ccb.text: “所以，你在祭坛前献祭的时候，要是想起有弟兄和你有过节，

csbs.text: 所以，如果你在祭坛献上祭物的时候，在那里想起弟兄向你怀着怨，
